name: AuditEntry per tier assignment
what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'AuditEntry per tier assignment'
how_it_solves: Each RankedIntervention has an AuditEntry recording tier, source, promotion_source, and the exact modality contributions.
why_it_exists: Full traceability: given a response, you can reconstruct why an axis got the tier it did.
